reference-code.description: Days in Membership-Average Days in membership too low
Student SASID from last period is missing#Missing StudentSchoolEnrollment
Invalid Grad core curriculum code
School Code (DOE015) not valid with SPED Placement code Age 6:21(DOE034)
Enrollment Status(DOE012) = 40 requires a SPED Level of Need Code (DOE038)
Graduates: High school completer plans code (DOE033) invalid with enrollment status
SPED students must have other SPED data elements
SPED data elements not needed for non:SPED student
School code not valid for reason for reporting
Enrollment Status (DOE12), not valid with the school code
Public/Charter School not valid for report/enroll code
Days In Membership=0 is invalid
Enrollment not valid with Private school
DOB does not match directory
Days in Membership invalid for Enrollment status code (Oct)
FN: First Name does not match directory
MN: Middle Name does not match directory
City/Town of Residence is missing for SASID
City/Town of Residence is missing for SASID
First (native) language code is missing
Student SASID from last period is missing#Missing StudentPersonal
Student SASID from last period is missing#Missing exit date
SIF1070 - Reason for Reporting code is missing
Enrollment status code is missing
Race Code is Missing
Grade invalid with School Code
Private or Approved Sped Grade not listed in reported school
City of Birth is invalid
SPED placement age 6:21 (DOE034) invalid
Student SASID not found in student directory. Invalid SASID.
Race code is invalid
Enrollment status code is invalid
Reason for Enrollment code is invalid
City/Town of Residence is invalid
Grade code is invalid
Country of origin code is invalid
First (native) language code is invalid
LEP code is invalid
Title I Participation code is invalid
ELL: English Learners Program code is invalid
Days In Membership must be less than 261 days
Days In Attendance must be between 0 and 261
Having no days in attendance (D0E017) is not likely with reported days in membership (DOE018)
Days in Attendance not valid for out:placed student(s)
Sped Placement age 6:21 not valid with reason for reporting
Days total: UnexcusedDays + DaysAttendance Greater than Days in membership
School Code is Invalid
Public or charter School/Grade not in reporting district
Services Only students may not be enrolled in the reporting district
Title I Code applies only to Public/Charter
Title I: School has schoolwide Title I. Students must be reported with DOE020=01 and DOE030=00
Title I: Student must not have Title I Code = 01 (School Wide)
Title I: School has no Title I.
District does not offer choice. Reason for Enrollment (DOE013) = 02 is invalid
Sending Status Reason For reporting/reason for enrollment invalid
Charter School: Not valid Reason for Enrollment(A,1)
TownCode inconsistent with Reason for Reporting(B)
TownCode inconsistent with Reason for Reporting(01)
Town of Residence: 888 valid only for students living out-of-state
Enrollment status (DOE012)=04 (graduate) not valid when student not passed MCAS
Enrollment status (DOE012)=04 (graduate) not valid when student not passed MCAS
Enrollment Status (DOE012) = 01 or 04 invalid when an SCS exception has been granted.
Days in Membership exceeds maximum for collection period
Days in Attendance exceeds maximum for collection period
CTE program code (DOE035) invalid for reason for reporting (DOE011)
Only English Language Learners may report SLIFE.
Days in Membership (DOE018) must accrue for enrolled students
Days in Attendance/Membership=555 invalid for students already submitted in EOY with 555
Charter School: Not valid Reason for Reporting
Current or Former SPED (DOE034) must have placement 01, 10-90
Current or Former SPED (DOE032) must have placement 01, 30-48
Days in Membership Cannot accrue for unenrolled students
Previous year Aged Out / Deceased students should not be reported this year.
Previous year graduates should not be reported this year
SPED Placemen t code invalid with school code(DOE015)
Days in Membership invalid for Enrollment status code (Oct)
Sending Status: Non:Sending Student must go to Public or Charter school in own district
Charter School: Not valid Reason for Enrollment
Student previously reported on 504 plan must continue to report as 504 plan
No students enrolled in school and/or grade level
Sending Status: Sending Student cannot go to Public or Charter school
PreSchool/HomeSchool only valid with enrollment status (DOE012) = 40 or 41
Enrollment not valid with Approved Sped school
Non-Instructional Title I code (DOE030) is invalid
Graduate percentage too low
Perfect attendance for entire grade not likely
Perfect attendance for entire school not likely
SLIFE (DOE041) has an invalid value
Summer graduates,Aged Out, Deceased reported in October must not be reported in March/EOY
